name: thepexcel-excel
description: Full Excel control via COM — Power Query, PivotTables, Data Model/DAX, VBA, dynamic arrays, charts, screenshots. Windows only.

tools.name: excel_workbook
tools.description: Manage open workbooks: discover, open, create, save, save-as, and close.

tools.name: excel_sheet
tools.description: Manage worksheets within a workbook: list, add, rename, delete.

tools.name: excel_range
tools.description: Read and write cell ranges, including dynamic-array spill and Python-in-Excel formulas.

tools.name: excel_powerquery
tools.description: Manage Power Query (M code) queries: CRUD, refresh, load to table/model, analyze, and parameter ops.

tools.name: excel_table
tools.description: Manage Excel Tables (ListObjects): create, read, append, add columns, sort, filter, style, totals, rename, delete.

tools.name: excel_pivot
tools.description: Manage PivotTables: create, add/remove/move fields, set layout, refresh, read, and delete.

tools.name: excel_datamodel
tools.description: Manage the Excel Data Model (Power Pivot): tables, relationships, DAX measures, and CUBE formula helpers.

tools.name: excel_name
tools.description: Manage defined names: named ranges, constants, and LAMBDA formulas.

tools.name: excel_chart
tools.description: Create and manage embedded charts: create, configure, change source, export PNG, delete.

tools.name: excel_shape
tools.description: Add and manage drawing objects (images, text boxes, AutoShapes): add, list, move, delete.

tools.name: excel_slicer
tools.description: Manage slicers and date timelines for PivotTables and Tables: add, add_timeline, list, delete, connect.

tools.name: excel_sparkline
tools.description: Add, clear, and list in-cell sparkline mini-charts (line, column, win/loss).

tools.name: excel_format
tools.description: Apply cell formatting: font, fill, border, number format, alignment, column/row sizing, autofit.

tools.name: excel_view
tools.description: Control worksheet display settings: freeze panes, gridlines, zoom, row/column headings.

tools.name: excel_conditional_format
tools.description: Add or remove conditional formatting rules: data bar, color scale, icon set, cell rule, top/bottom, clear.

tools.name: excel_validation
tools.description: Add or remove data validation on ranges: dropdown list, number/decimal/date/text-length/custom constraints, clear.

tools.name: excel_page_setup
tools.description: Configure page setup and export to PDF: orientation, paper size, margins, fit-to-page, print area, titles, headers/footers, PDF export.

tools.name: excel_comment
tools.description: Add, edit, reply to, delete, list, and get cell comments (legacy notes and threaded).

tools.name: excel_hyperlink
tools.description: Add, list, and delete worksheet hyperlinks (URL, internal, email, file).

tools.name: excel_outline
tools.description: Group/ungroup rows and columns, control outline levels, and clear all groupings.

tools.name: excel_protection
tools.description: Protect/unprotect worksheets and workbooks, set cell lock/formula-hidden flags, and query protection status.

tools.name: excel_vba
tools.description: Manage VBA modules and run macros (opt-in, requires THEPEXCEL_MCP_ENABLE_VBA=1 and AccessVBOM trust).

tools.name: excel_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a range, sheet, or chart as PNG for visual verification by the AI agent.

tools.name: excel_find_replace
tools.description: Find, count, or replace text across a range, sheet, or entire workbook with match-case and whole-cell options.

tools.name: excel_diff
tools.description: Diff two ranges or two whole sheets cell-by-cell on values, formulas, or both (pure read, no mutation).

tools.name: excel_snapshot
tools.description: Non-destructive workbook safety copies: snapshot (SaveCopyAs), list, restore (open copy as new workbook), delete.

autolaunch.description: Auto-launch Excel if no instance is running

enable_vba.description: Enable the excel_vba tool (requires VBA project object model trust setting in Excel)
